## RECIPE\_VERSION\_ID\_PATTERN variable

Pattern for valid recipe version IDs Format: YYYY-MM-DD-NN with optional label (lowercase alphanumeric with dashes)

**Signature:**

```typescript
RECIPE_VERSION_ID_PATTERN: RegExp
```
